features: Premium Quality: Our square facial pads offer a soft touch and are crafted for durability, ensuring effective skincare.
Ultra Absorbent: These pads efficiently absorb liquids for toner application, makeup removal, and mask application, minimizing waste and maximizing product usage.
Versatile & Convenient: Use our pads for even product application, gentle exfoliation, or removing makeup and nail polish without leaving residue behind.
Easy to Clean: Our reusable square pads are washable, providing a sustainable option for your skincare routine. Rinse after each use for future sessions.
Compact & Travel-Friendly: Take our lightweight square pads anywhere for on-the-go skincare. They are compact, making them perfect for travel and storage.
description: Product Description 40 pack of 100% pure cotton facial pads - square shape Ingredients Cotton Directions 1. Tear off a pad from the pack. 2. Apply toner or other skincare products to the pad. 3. Gently swipe the pad over your face for makeup removal or toner application. 4. Use the pad to apply and remove masks. 5. For gentle exfoliation, lightly rub the pad on your skin. 6. After use, rinse the pad with water and let it air dry. 7. Wash the pad with mild soap and water before reuse. 8. Store the pads in a clean, dry place. See more
